channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17620] Lustre client gets stuck in lov_layout_wait() awaiting for IO completion
item.description:
number of threads are in this state and no threads "working" on IO:

PID: 107101   TASK: ffff922a41bccec0  CPU: 3    COMMAND: "lfs"
 #0 [ffff922a3a3efa28] __schedule at ffffffff826f6ab6
    /tmp/kernel/kernel/sched/core.c: 3755
 #1 [ffff922a3a3efa80] schedule at ffffffff826f7050
    /tmp/kernel/kernel/sched/core.c: 4602
 #2 [ffff922a3a3efa98] lov_layout_wait at ffffffffc0ad32ff [lov]
    /home/lustre/master-mine/lustre/lov/lov_object.c: 1275
 #3 [ffff922a3a3efaf0] lov_conf_set at ffffffffc0ad4500 [lov]
    /home/lustre/master-mine/lustre/lov/lov_object.c: 1430
 #4 [ffff922a3a3efb68] cl_conf_set at ffffffffc04618aa [obdclass]
    /home/lustre/master-mine/lustre/obdclass/cl_object.c: 318
 #5 [ffff922a3a3efb98] ll_layout_conf at ffffffffc11bc162 [lustre]
    /home/lustre/master-mine/lustre/llite/file.c: 6180
 #6 [ffff922a3a3efc08] ll_layout_lock_set at ffffffffc11bca1c [lustre]
    /home/lustre/master-mine/lustre/llite/file.c: 6359
 #7 [ffff922a3a3efcd8] ll_layout_refresh at ffffffffc11bd92e [lustre]
    /home/lustre/master-mine/lustre/llite/file.c: 6485
 #8 [ffff922a3a3efd30] vvp_io_init at ffffffffc12117f2 [lustre]
    /home/lustre/master-mine/lustre/llite/vvp_io.c: 1877
 #9 [ffff922a3a3efd60] __cl_io_init at ffffffffc046c97d [obdclass]
    /home/lustre/master-mine/lustre/obdclass/cl_io.c: 135
#10 [ffff922a3a3efd90] ll_ioc_data_version at ffffffffc11aa3e5 [lustre]
    /home/lustre/master-mine/lustre/llite/file.c: 3332
#11 [ffff922a3a3efdc8] ll_file_ioctl at ffffffffc11c489d [lustre]
    /home/lustre/master-mine/lustre/llite/file.c: 3366
#12 [ffff922a3a3efe90] do_vfs_ioctl at ffffffff82273479
    /tmp/kernel/fs/ioctl.c: 48
#13 [ffff922a3a3efef8] ksys_ioctl at ffffffff82273af5
    /tmp/kernel/./include/linux/file.h: 44
#14 [ffff922a3a3eff30] __x64_sys_ioctl at ffffffff82273b41
    /tmp/kernel/fs/ioctl.c: 753
#15 [ffff922a3a3eff38] do_syscall_64 at ffffffff82002a2b
    /tmp/kernel/arch/x86/entry/common.c: 302
#16 [ffff922a3a3eff50] entry_SYSCALL_64_after_hwframe at ffffffff8280007d
    /tmp/kernel/arch/x86/entry/entry_64.S: 147
item.summary: Lustre client gets stuck in lov_layout_wait() awaiting for IO completion

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
layout refresh is a two-step process: 1) release current configuration with all objects 2) re-initialize a new one. the problem is that group locks are referenced by the objects used in the current configuration, meaning we can't release them technically.
but I guess the most interesting question is what kind of layout changes are acceptable while a grouplock is taken? I guess one more (stale) component should be OK, but what if it changes the components involved in migration itself? say, it just marks the original component stale?
only lfs migrate is affected, lfs mirror extend/resync don't use group locks so safe.
I've finally understood the problem and constructed the reproducer.

"Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54343
Subject: LU-17620 tests: layout refresh vs group lock deadlock
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 539f88fe1ee2753e8c7cf69662d74d90b2755801

"Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54310
Subject: LU-17620 lov: debug activ IOs per-thread
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: e971a8944c81294fda53c201d3ad956148560fef
